run_summary.summary: Same four deals from yesterday's scan — none have been applied yet and urgency is increasing. Flexsteel's Popfly application deadline WAS yesterday (Apr 24) — Kenny said he'd submit after Steinhafels but no confirmation email came in. Needs immediate verification in Popfly. SOJOS Sunglasses: Liz submitted revised content on Apr 23 and SOJOS promised a 24-hour turnaround — that window has now closed with no approval email received. Linkind SP6 content is due Monday Apr 27 (3 days). Wise Block rate request from Iris is still unanswered — launch window opens today (Apr 25).

suggestions.message: 🚨 The Popfly application deadline was YESTERDAY (Apr 24). Kenny said he'd submit after Steinhafels — no confirmation email came in. Log into Popfly NOW and verify the application is in. If the window closed, contact Ian Saunders (ian@popfly.com) immediately — he may be able to reopen it one more time.

🚨 Launch window opens TODAY (Apr 25) and Liz still hasn't sent her rate to Iris (iris@makewondermcn.com). SOJOS deadline was already a miss — don't let this one slip too. Even a ballpark quote keeps the door open. Offer: 1 YT/IG video, cash comp + free Botanical Series building block set.

⏰ SOJOS promised a 24-hour response on the revised IG Reel Liz sent Apr 23 — that window has now closed with no reply. Follow up with Ruby (marketing202@sojosvision.com) today: 'Hi Ruby! Just checking in — did you get a chance to review the updated video? Happy to make any final tweaks!'

📹 Content due Monday Apr 27 (3 days). Agency specs: nighttime lighting effects + app pattern controls = ~50% of video, voiceover must match visuals, lens in correct position. Liz said she'd try to deliver early — is it ready?

deals.next_action: URGENT: Verify Flexsteel/Popfly campaign application — deadline was Apr 24. Check Popfly dashboard now. If missed, email Ian Saunders (ian@popfly.com) immediately to request reopening.
deals.notes: [Apr 23]: Ian Saunders (Popfly) reopened the Flexsteel/Steinhafels campaign application after Kenny thought the window had already closed. Ian confirmed deadline was April 24 and asked Kenny to apply that day. Kenny replied he'd work on it after returning from Steinhafels — Ian 👍'd the message. No application confirmation email received. Deadline has passed — verify in Popfly dashboard.
deals.activity_note: Apr 24: Flexsteel/Popfly application deadline passed. Kenny said he'd submit after Steinhafels — no confirmation received. Verify in Popfly immediately; contact Ian if the window closed.

deals.next_action: Send rate/quotation to Iris TODAY — Botanical Series launch window is NOW OPEN (Apr 25-30)
deals.notes: [Apr 23]: Iris (Make Wonder MCN, Official Partner Agency for Wise Block) replied to Liz's follow-ups with a specific pitch for the Botanical Series (building blocks inspired by Eastern flora — Sakura Zen, Pine Breath, Maple Whisper, Blossom Harmony). Offering cash compensation + free product + Key Partner status. Deliverable: 1 YouTube or Instagram Video. Launch window: April 25-30. Sample delivery: 3-5 days after confirmation. Waiting on Liz's quotation to Iris (iris@makewondermcn.com).
deals.activity_note: Apr 25: Launch window opens — rate quote to Iris still unsent. Send quotation immediately to hold the opportunity.

deals.next_action: Film and deliver SP6 content — DUE Mon Apr 27 (nighttime lighting + app controls = ~50% of video, voiceover matching visuals)
deals.notes: [Apr 23]: Agency (via misslizdidit@socialmediacollabs.com) requested content by Monday/Tuesday (Apr 27-28). Liz replied 'That works! I can try to get something to you sooner.' Key filming requirements: lighting portion ~50% of video, main focus on nighttime lighting effects, avoid turning lights on in daylight, show app controlling pattern changes (clear interface shots), lens in correct position, visuals and voiceover must match, follow agreed concept closely.
deals.activity_note: Apr 23: Agency confirmed Mon/Tue deadline (Apr 27-28). Liz agreed and may deliver early. Key: nighttime lighting effects + app controls = 50% of video.

deals.next_action: Follow up with Ruby on content approval — 24-hr response window has elapsed, no reply received
deals.notes:
[Apr 23]: Liz sent revised IG Reel content to Ruby — added voiceover introducing SOJOS sunglasses and brand per Ruby's Apr 22 request. SOJOS said they respond within 24 hours. That window has now passed with no reply.
[Apr 22]: Liz submitted original video draft + caption to Ruby for approval. Ruby requested voiceover addition.
[Apr 20]: Ruby acknowledged draft was coming, provided IG Reel requirements (10+ sec, 50% close-ups, tag @sojosvision, hashtags #sojos #amazonsunglasses, code MISSLIZSOJOS).
[Apr 18]: Liz confirmed receipt of 4 pairs of SOJOS sunglasses. Draft deadline 4/23; 2nd video planned for May.
Caption used: 'The sunnies I'm rocking this season! Comment SUN for link! @sojosvision is my go to brand for sunglasses...code MISSLIZSOJOS.'
Compensation: product-only — 4 pairs of sunglasses + 10% off affiliate code. 2 deliverables total (1 IG Reel now + 1 video in May).
deals.activity_note: Apr 23: Liz submitted revised SOJOS IG Reel with voiceover per Ruby's request. Awaiting approval — 24-hr window elapsed Apr 24 with no reply. Follow up today.
